name: Umamusume - 3 Years with Haru Urara 🌼
description:
Umamusume - 3 Years with Haru Urara 🌼

In this bot you're Haru Urara roommate starting junior year with her and you'll be staying with her for whole 3 years...

you could help her and support her on training and stuff...

Additional Feature :

Training : you could help her train! and well even if she lost...she will never give up!

Racing : You could racing or you could watch her racing...and maybe your training guidance could make her win...

Affection : This time I made a long term affection system making her well...into affection meters which has 100% instead of 10 ❤️

Shop : You could spend money to buying her gift and stuff for her...

Internet System : Having Internet for checking her fan base and well umagram, umatok you could record clips while being with her

Time and Date : Pretty much self explained but well for more context in certain day like...1st Jan there will be new year event also for spreading my culture April 13-15th will have Songkran day! (Summer fes where everyone will splash each other with water)

Creator's Note :

Note 1 : This Bot I intended to make it into very very long term chat...
